title: Include New Columns in Webhook (column_value_update)
excerpt: If a new column is created the new column updates won’t trigger an existing webhook that listens for the column_value_update event.

posts.author: kamescg (kames)
posts.cookedHtml: If a new column is created the new column updates won’t trigger an existing webhook that listens for the column_value_update event.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kamescg,

I’ve gone ahead and added it to our product roadmap - while I can’t promise it will be done tomorrow, rest assured it’s on our radar.

-Danny
